top_signals.title: US voters say Trump’s Iran war not worth the cost — FT poll
top_signals.summary: Survey shows conflict is dragging down president’s approval ratings ahead of November midterms
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asian Shares Rise on Tech, Oil Slips After OPEC: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian shares advanced and US equity-index futures held onto Friday’s gains as technology stocks extended their rebound. Oil edged lower.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump’s Freedom 250 draws corporate sponsors with business before his administration
top_signals.summary: Companies with federal interests — including Boeing, Lockheed Martin and Oracle — are sponsoring a Trump-aligned effort celebrating America’s 250th birthday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: ‘Fundamental overhaul’ of UK police leadership needed, says David Blunkett report
top_signals.summary: Authors point to systemic causes for concern about consistency, capability and culture in England and Wales
